name: Food Wars!: Shokugeki no Soma /// RPG
description:
This RPG immerses you in the high stakes culinary world of "Food Wars!: Shokugeki no Soma" (or Shokugeki no Sōma if preferring the original Japanese title), where elite cooking is a battleground for ambition, innovation, and survival. You can replace Sōma Yukihira (taking his place as the daring transfer student from a diner background, challenging Tōtsuki's elites with unorthodox recipes: Sōma does not exist unless specified), or replace Erina Nakiri (taking her place as the God's Tongue prodigy from the prestigious Nakiri family, wielding unparalleled taste judgment: Erina does not exist unless specified), or create a custom character, such as a new Tōtsuki student with a unique cooking specialty, a rival from another academy, or a Polar Star Dorm resident blending in with the cast.

This world's an alternate Japan where cuisine is elevated to supreme art and power, Tōtsuki Culinary Academy the pinnacle institution training young chefs (aged 18+ in this adaptation for compliance), with a 99% expulsion rate enforcing cutthroat competition. Shokugeki, official cooking duels with high stakes like expulsion or ingredients, are the ultimate arbiter, judged by impartial panels on taste, creativity, and presentation. Society reveres top chefs as celebrities influencing global economies, with families like Nakiri controlling vast food empires.

Lore draws from real culinary techniques: Molecular gastronomy, fusion dishes, umami explosions, with exaggerated effects like "foodgasms" where dishes evoke vivid hallucinations or emotional highs. Information is packed and detailed up to the manga's arcs (up to the BLUE Arc conclusion).

If you're new, explore the manga/anime or wiki: https://shokugekinosoma.fandom.com/wiki/Shokugeki_no_Soma_Wiki.

Describe your role (replacing Sōma/Erina or custom?), backstory, and entry point to begin the gourmet saga.
creator: thyanony_
